overall.description: Atmospheric horror game footage showing a character exploring a dimly lit old house or hotel interior with a flashlight. The character navigates narrow hallways, wooden staircases, and furnished rooms containing mannequins and vintage decor, creating a tense, ominous mood typical of psychological survival games.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow hallway with wooden staircase and mannequin displays

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden staircase while illuminating creepy mannequin figures positioned on landings with flashlight

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with white painted handrails leading upward
creepy humanoid mannequins posed on stair landing wearing vintage clothing
old-fashioned wall-mounted light fixture providing dim ambient light
white painted wooden handrail running along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a narrow, dimly lit wooden staircase in an old building. Flashlight illumination reveals creepy mannequin figures posed on the landing, while vintage wall sconces provide minimal ambient light. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic.

scene_state.functional_zone: furnished bedroom with sitting area and writing desk

events.description: enters furnished bedroom from narrow hallway staircase

agents.ego_description: moving through room examining bed, red sofa, and desk areas while sweeping flashlight across vintage furniture

entered.detail: large bed with white bedspread and wooden headboard against the wall
burgundy upholstered sofa positioned beneath sloped ceiling
antique wooden writing desk with items scattered on surface
large model airplane suspended from ceiling by wire
tall dark wooden wardrobe cabinet with paneled doors
small table lamp with warm glow on nightstand

segments.scene_description: Entering a furnished bedroom from the stairs, the character explores a space containing a double bed, red sofa, and antique wooden desk. A model airplane hangs from the sloped ceiling, and the flashlight reveals vintage decor including framed pictures and a large wardrobe. The room has hardwood flooring and warm accent lighting from a bedside lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: upstairs hallway with safety equipment and water cooler

events.description: exits bedroom back into narrow corridor hallway

agents.ego_description: proceeding through carpeted corridor passing wall posters and fire safety equipment

entered.detail: red fire extinguisher mounted on wall in corner
framed notices and decorative posters hanging on hallway walls
tall water dispenser with blue bottle on top

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom into a narrow carpeted hallway. The flashlight illuminates a fire extinguisher mounted on the wall, a water cooler, and various framed posters. The corridor feels confined with wooden doorways leading to other rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered storage room with scattered boxes and debris

events.description: enters cluttered storage room filled with boxes and abandoned wheelchair

agents.ego_description: navigating through cluttered space with scattered cardboard boxes, storage containers, and debris on floor

entered.detail: stacked and scattered cardboard boxes of various sizes
empty medical wheelchair positioned against wall
large green houseplant in white pot on small table
wooden shelving unit with various items and boxes stored

segments.scene_description: Entering a cluttered storage room, the character navigates around scattered cardboard boxes, an abandoned wheelchair, and storage shelves. The room has a disused, messy appearance with debris on the wooden floor and a potted plant near the window. The space feels neglected compared to the previous furnished room.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway and return staircase to lower level

events.description: exits storage room back into hallway approaching staircase
begins descending wooden staircase to lower floor

agents.ego_description: leaving the cluttered room and walking down the wooden staircase to return to the lower level

entered.detail: same wooden staircase now being descended toward lower floor
creepy mannequins visible again on the stair landing from different angle

segments.scene_description: The character exits the storage room and returns to the hallway, approaching the wooden staircase. At 62 seconds, the character begins descending the stairs, passing the creepy mannequin figures once again on the landing, completing the exploration loop and returning toward the lower level of the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic staircase into a furnished bedroom and finally through a narrow service corridor. It begins by ascending a dimly lit wooden staircase where the flashlight reveals eerie mannequin figures posed on the landing under minimal ambient light. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a bedroom featuring a double bed, a red sofa, and a model airplane hanging from the sloped ceiling, with the lighting shifting to a warmer glow from a bedside lamp. The movement then carries the viewer out of the room and into a confined, carpeted hallway. Finally, the flashlight sweeps across a fire extinguisher and a water cooler mounted along the walls as the camera pushes deeper into the corridor past various wooden doorways.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic clutter of a storage room back into the ominous openness of a central hallway. It begins by navigating through a neglected space filled with scattered cardboard boxes, an abandoned wheelchair, and debris-strewn wooden floors. As the camera moves past a potted plant by the window, the scene shifts from the messy interior of the storage room back into the dim corridor. The movement then leads toward the wooden staircase, passing by unsettling mannequin figures on the landing before finally descending toward the lower level of the building.
